subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! That which thou hadst written became known and understood, concerning abuse and calumny [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی معلوم و مفهوم گشت از سب وشتم و طعن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
